mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (user_no, coupon_type, grade, discount_amount, is_used, issued_at, expired_at) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{couponType}, #{grade}, #{discountAmount}, 0, NOW(), #{expiredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND is_used = 0 AND expired_at > NOW() ORDER BY issued_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND coupon_type = 'MONTHLY' AND YEAR(issued_at) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(issued_at) = MONTH(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND coupon_type = 'NEW_USER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_grade (no, grade, total_sales) VALUES (#{no}, #{grade}, #{totalSales})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_grade SET grade = #{grade}, total_sales = #{totalSales} WHERE no = #{no}
